frame.instructions:
Generate a short memo based on data.title and data.prompt, then write it to the workspace at data.filename using control_ir.

The memo must include:
- A heading line with the title
- 2–3 paragraphs of body text based on data.prompt

After writing, set char_count to the exact number of characters in the content you wrote (len of the string). Do not leave it as 0.

data.text: meeting_notes.txt というファイルに、今日のミーティングの議事録メモを書いてください。

candidate_outputs.description: Metadata about a memo that was written to the workspace. filename is the path; char_count is the number of characters written; summary is a one-sentence description of the content.

available_control_ops.description: Read, write, or glob files. op='write': relative path only — creates/overwrites inside the workspace. op='read': retrieve a single file's content. op='glob': expand a glob pattern (supports ** for recursive) and return matching file paths; use this to discover files before reading them. max_results (default 50) caps glob output. Readable locations: workspace (relative paths) and /Users/yasudatetsuya/Workspace/junk/claude_sandbox/sandbox_2/dsl (absolute paths). Writes are always workspace-relative; absolute paths are read-only.

Pause the phase and ask the user a clarifying question. The user's response is injected into user_responses in the next ContextFrame and the same phase re-runs with the original input_artifact unchanged. Use when required data is missing and cannot be inferred.

example.question: What should the app be named?

ops.content:
本日のミーティング議事録

本日のミーティングは、プロジェクトの進捗状況について話し合われました。各担当者から報告があり、全体として順調に進んでいることが確認されました。

いくつかの懸念事項についても議論されましたが、具体的な対策案が提示され、次回のミーティングまでに実施することになりました。次回のミーティングは来週火曜日を予定しています。

frame.instructions:
Read back the file at data.filename from the workspace using control_ir to verify it was written correctly.
Use data.char_count and data.summary to populate the output artifact fields defined in the candidate schema.

data.summary: 今日のミーティングの議事録メモが生成され、meeting_notes.txt に保存されました。

candidate_outputs.description:
Result of the file I/O test: filename written, a preview of the content,
character count, and a boolean indicating whether read-back succeeded.

Readable locations: workspace (relative paths) and /Users/yasudatetsuya/Workspace/junk/claude_sandbox/sandbox_2/dsl (absolute paths). Writes are always workspace-relative; absolute paths are read-only.
